name: tandoor-recipes-mcp
description: Tandoor Recipes MCP server — recipes, meal plans, shopping lists, ingredients, cook logs, nutrition, AI import.

tandoor_url.title: Tandoor URL
tandoor_url.description: Base URL of your Tandoor instance (e.g. https://tandoor.example.com)

tandoor_token.title: Tandoor API Token
tandoor_token.description: API token with write access. Create one at Settings → API Tokens in Tandoor.

tandoor_mcp_profile.title: Tool Profile
tandoor_mcp_profile.description: `basic` exposes ~40 core tools (smaller context). `full` includes all ~100 tools.
